title: pelargonium × tortuosum
intro: Pelargonium × tortuosum, also known as Geranium or Barberton daisy, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and versatile medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in compounds like geraniol, linalool, and citronellal, which contribute to its medicinal and aromatic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × tortuosum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can aid in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to relieve stress, promote relaxation, and support overall well-being.
